strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React across multiple senior roles
Direct AI-agent infrastructure experience at re:cinq including MCP code generators
Strong testing/TDD background (Fluent-Asserts, Trial, Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
No Vitest experience listed; testing experience is in other frameworks
Limited explicit cloud/Kubernetes depth (AWS CDK mentioned briefly, K8s only for self-hosted GISCollective)
response.justification: Candidate has well over the 6+ years required, with deep full-stack TypeScript/Node/React work at Optilyz and RIDE, plus current AI-agent/MCP work at re:cinq that directly matches the AI agent requirement. Engineering rigor is evident through TDD advocacy, open-source test tooling (Trial, Fluent-Asserts), and teaching activity. Databases (MongoDB, MySQL, SQL), Docker, Kubernetes, and Java are all present. Gaps are Nest.js and Vitest specifically, and cloud depth is light, but these are easily bridgeable given the demonstrated breadth and polyglot adaptability.
